subcodes.first_line: He is the Founder and the Unifier of hearts! Praise be unto Thee, my Lord, for having united through the breaths of Thy servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الموسس و المولف بین القلوب لک الحمد یا الهی بما الفت بانفاس عبدک
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
